<h1>Source code for booktx.status</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Typed project status snapshot and runtime index.</span>

<span class="sd">This module owns the record/word/chunk/chapter aggregation that used to live</span>
<span class="sd">as the private ``_project_status_snapshot`` dict inside :mod:`booktx.cli`. It</span>
<span class="sd">returns a typed :class:`StatusSnapshot` (which serializes to the stable</span>
<span class="sd">``status --json`` v1 shape) plus a :class:`StatusRuntimeIndex` dataclass that</span>
<span class="sd">carries the lookup maps the command layer still needs for task creation and</span>
<span class="sd">record acceptance.</span>

<span class="sd">Design notes:</span>

<span class="sd">- The public JSON shape is preserved exactly, including the nested</span>
<span class="sd">  ``record_range: {start, end}`` field on each chapter. Do not flatten it to</span>
<span class="sd">  ``start_record_id``/``end_record_id`` without intentionally versioning to v2.</span>
<span class="sd">- The snapshot model has *only* public fields; no ``_private`` keys leak into</span>
<span class="sd">  JSON output. Runtime lookup maps live on the separate</span>
<span class="sd">  :class:`StatusRuntimeIndex` so they never get serialized.</span>
<span class="sd">- This module is intentionally free of Typer/Rich imports so it can be unit</span>
<span class="sd">  tested directly. CLI-specific error UX (``_die``) stays in ``cli.py``; the</span>
<span class="sd">  caller computes ``context_exists``/``context_ready`` and passes them in.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">dataclasses</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">dataclass</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">typing</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">TYPE_CHECKING</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">pydantic</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Field</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.chapters</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>

<span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>

    <span class="n">load_translation_version_ledger</span><span class="p">,</span>

<span class="p">)</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="coverage_status">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.status.coverage_status">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">coverage_status</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">total</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">has_error</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the coverage status label for a chunk or chapter.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">has_error</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;invalid&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translated</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;pending&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translated</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="n">total</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;complete&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;in_progress&quot;</span></div>

<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">StatusRuntimeIndex</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Lookup maps derived while building a :class:`StatusSnapshot`.</span>

<span class="sd">    These are intentionally not serialized. They carry the live objects the</span>
<span class="sd">    command layer needs for task creation, record acceptance, and selection.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">SourceRecordView</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">translated_by_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">record_ids_by_chapter</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]</span>
    <span class="n">record_to_chapter</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">chapters_by_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ChapterProgress</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_summaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChapterProgress</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_summaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChunkProgress</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">record_error_by_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span></div>



<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">EpubAuditFindingSummary</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One EPUB chapter-audit finding surfaced in status output.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">code</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">message</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="EpubAuditSummary">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.status.EpubAuditSummary">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">EpubAuditSummary</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Recomputed EPUB visible-TOC chapter-audit summary for the current source.</span>

<span class="sd">    Always recomputed at status/gate time; the persisted report is user-facing</span>
<span class="sd">    only and is never trusted for workflow gating.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">error_count</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">warning_count</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">has_blocking_errors</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubAuditFindingSummary</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="StatusBundle">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.status.StatusBundle">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">StatusBundle</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A status snapshot paired with its runtime index.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StatusSnapshot</span>
    <span class="n">index</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StatusRuntimeIndex</span>

    <span class="n">epub_audit</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EpubAuditSummary</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_chapter_map_for_workflow</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ensure_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">epub_chapter_audit_summary</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">EpubAuditSummary</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Recompute the EPUB chapter audit for the current source, or None.</span>

<span class="sd">    Uses the already-ensured ``chapter_map`` so status and work-selection gates</span>
<span class="sd">    always audit the current source level rather than trusting a persisted</span>
<span class="sd">    report. Non-EPUB projects return ``None``.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">proj</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_toc_audit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">audit_epub_chapter_map</span>

    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">audit_epub_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001 - gates must not crash status</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">EpubAuditSummary</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">has_blocking_errors</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[</span>
                <span class="n">EpubAuditFindingSummary</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;error&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">code</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub_chapter_audit_unavailable&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">EpubAuditSummary</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">error_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">error_findings</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">warning_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning_findings</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">has_blocking_errors</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">error_findings</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">EpubAuditFindingSummary</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">code</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">code</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">href</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">finding</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span>
        <span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="build_status_snapshot">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.status.build_status_snapshot">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">build_status_snapshot</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context_exists</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context_ready</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">StatusBundle</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Build a typed status snapshot and runtime index for ``proj``.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``context_exists``/``context_ready`` are computed by the caller (the CLI</span>
<span class="sd">    owns the invalid-context error UX). Everything else — source/chunk</span>
<span class="sd">    loading, effective-translation merge, chapter mapping, coverage math — is</span>
<span class="sd">    owned here.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_source_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_chunks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">load_source_chunks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">)}</span>
    <span class="n">source_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_source_records</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_map</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_chapter_map_for_workflow</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">effective</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_effective_translated_chunks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">source_by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_records</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">translated_by_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">record</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">effective</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">effective</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span>
    <span class="n">record_error_by_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">finding</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">finding</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">findings</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_has_error</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">finding</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">findings</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;store&quot;</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>

    <span class="n">ordered_record_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_records</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">record_index_by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">idx</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ordered_record_ids</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">record_ids_by_chapter</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="n">record_to_chapter</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">record_index_by_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">start_record_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">record_index_by_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end_record_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ordered_record_ids</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">record_ids_by_chapter</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ids</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ids</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">record_to_chapter</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span>

    <span class="n">chunk_summaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChunkProgress</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_record_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">translated</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk_record_ids</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">translated_by_id</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">source_words_total</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sum</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk_record_ids</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">source_words_translated</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sum</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">translated</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_summaries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">ChunkProgress</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>

                <span class="n">records_remaining</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_record_ids</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">),</span>

                    <span class="n">has_error</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk_has_error</span><span class="p">,</span>

            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">chapter_summaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChapterProgress</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_record_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">record_ids_by_chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span>
        <span class="n">translated</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">record_id</span>

        <span class="p">]</span>

            <span class="n">record_id</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_record_ids</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">translated_by_id</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">pending_chunk_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="n">seen_pending_chunks</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">pending</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen_pending_chunks</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="n">seen_pending_chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">source_words_total</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sum</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_record_ids</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">translated</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_summaries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">ChapterProgress</span><span class="p">(</span>

                <span class="p">),</span>

                <span class="n">records_remaining</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_record_ids</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">source_words_total</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_words_total</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">source_words_translated</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_words_translated</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">source_words_remaining</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_words_total</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">source_words_translated</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">status</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">coverage_status</span><span class="p">(</span>

                    <span class="n">translated</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="n">has_error</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk_has_error</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span>
                    <span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">chapters_by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_summaries</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">next_chapter</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">next</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_summaries</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_remaining</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">total_source_words</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sum</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_records</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">translated_source_words</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sum</span><span class="p">(</span>

    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chunks_complete</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sum</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk_summaries</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_translated</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_total</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk_summaries</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_translated</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_total</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chunks_pending</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_summaries</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">chunks_complete</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">chunks_partial</span>
    <span class="n">chapters_complete</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sum</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_summaries</span>

    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chapters_partial</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sum</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_summaries</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_translated</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_total</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sha256</span>

    <span class="n">source_drifted</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extracted_sha</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">extracted_sha</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">current_source_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">proj</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">snapshot</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">StatusSnapshot</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">SourceStatus</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">filename</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="nb">format</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>

        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">ContextStatus</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_exists</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ready</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_ready</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">StatusTotals</span><span class="p">(</span>

            <span class="n">translated_words</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translated_source_words</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">remaining_words</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">total_source_words</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">translated_source_words</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">records_total</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_records</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">records_translated</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translated_by_id</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">records_remaining</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_records</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translated_by_id</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">chunks_total</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_summaries</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">chunks_complete</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunks_complete</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chunks_partial</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunks_partial</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chunks_pending</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunks_pending</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chapters_total</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_summaries</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">chapters_complete</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapters_complete</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chapters_partial</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapters_partial</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chapters_pending</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapters_pending</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">invalid_translation_files</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_has_error</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">stale_translation_files</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="p">{</span>
                    <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span>
                    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">finding</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">findings</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rule</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;stale_translation&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">}</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="nb">next</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">next_chapter</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[],</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">store</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_translation_store</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">ledger</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_translation_version_ledger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">store</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">ledger</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">store</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">version_counts</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">VersionCoverage</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
        <span class="n">track_counts</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TrackCoverage</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">stored</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">store</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">seen_track_versions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">versions</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">coverage</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">version_counts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">setdefault</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">VersionCoverage</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">coverage</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_with_candidate</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">coverage</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_records</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

                <span class="n">track</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">track_counts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">setdefault</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">TrackCoverage</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">latest_subversion</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">latest_subversion</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen_track_versions</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_with_candidate</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
                    <span class="n">seen_track_versions</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_records</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ledger</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">track_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ledger_track</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tracks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">track_coverage</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">track_counts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">setdefault</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">track_id</span><span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="n">TrackCoverage</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">ledger_track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">track_coverage</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">label</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ledger_track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">label</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ledger_track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversions</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">track_coverage</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">latest_subversion</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span>
                        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">subversion</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ledger_track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversions</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">()</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_coverage</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">version_counts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">version_counts</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">part</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">part</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">)),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">track_coverage</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">track_counts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">track_counts</span><span class="p">)]</span>

    <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">StatusRuntimeIndex</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">translated_by_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translated_by_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">record_ids_by_chapter</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_ids_by_chapter</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">record_to_chapter</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_to_chapter</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapters_by_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapters_by_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_summaries</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter_summaries</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_summaries</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_summaries</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">record_error_by_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_error_by_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">epub_audit</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">epub_chapter_audit_summary</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">StatusBundle</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">index</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">epub_audit</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">epub_audit</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="build_profiles_overview">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.status.build_profiles_overview">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">build_profiles_overview</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ProfilesOverview</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">profiles</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">list_profiles</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_source_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">persist_discovery</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001</span>
        <span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_file</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">source_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">load_source_records</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="n">items</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ProfileOverview</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="c1"># Build the shared source runtime index once: source chunks and records are</span>
    <span class="c1"># shared across profiles, so avoid reloading them (and rewriting</span>
    <span class="c1"># chapter-map.json) once per profile. Each profile only contributes its</span>
    <span class="c1"># own effective translations.</span>
    <span class="n">shared_chunks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">load_source_chunks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)}</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">shared_total_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">load_source_records</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">profiles</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">profile_project</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_profile_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">profile_cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_profile_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">translated_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">shared_chunks</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">effective</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_effective_translated_chunks</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">profile_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">shared_chunks</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">translated_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="p">{</span>
                    <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span>
                    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">effective</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">()</span>
                    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span>
                <span class="p">}</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">items</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">ProfileOverview</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">kind</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="c1"># The live identity lives in translations/&lt;profile&gt;/identity.json;</span>
                <span class="c1"># the value embedded in config.toml is only the initial default.</span>
                <span class="n">model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">resolve_identity</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_project</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">relative_to</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">))</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">profile_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
                <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">translated_records</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translated_records</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">total_records</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">shared_total_records</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ProfilesOverview</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_records</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_records</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profiles</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="selected_chapter">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.status.selected_chapter">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">selected_chapter</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StatusBundle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ChapterProgress</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the focused chapter for the ``status``/``next`` commands.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``chapter_id=None`` selects the first chapter with remaining records</span>
<span class="sd">    (``snapshot.next``), which is ``None`` when everything is translated.</span>
<span class="sd">    A specific ``chapter_id`` returns that chapter whether or not it still has</span>
<span class="sd">    remaining records; the caller decides how to react to a complete chapter.</span>
<span class="sd">    Returns ``None`` only when the id is unknown.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">next</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters_by_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">)</span></div>

</pre></div>
